creator: cs@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Sorry for complaining again. Your shar file uncompresses fine but the way you write your Makefile is totally against any policy. Did you consult the Porter's Handbook? Please also always run portlint before re-submitting again. 
Here are some of the complaints: 
- COMMENTS starts lower caps 
- You have to use tabs after variables 
- The order of the variables is very important 
- you still use the old style header 
- there needs to be a SVN capable header in Makefile 
- etc. etc. 

All in all, it is too much work for me to fix it for you. Would you please mind going through your files again using portlint. It will tell you exactly what to fix. 

I am very happy to get your new shar file soon again. Sorry for the hassle but we need to maintain certain standards. Feel free to ask back per mail if you have any questions.
